data.processing_time: Outside the UK: usually 12 weeks. Inside the UK (meet financial requirements and English language requirements): usually 8 weeks. Inside the UK (do not meet financial requirements and English language requirements): about 12 months. Option to pay for a faster decision available.

essential_apps.description: Access your NHS services, book GP appointments, order repeat prescriptions, view your health record, and get health advice.
The ultimate public transport app for urban navigation, providing real-time information for buses, trains, tubes, taxis, and more across major UK cities.
Manage your money with a digital-first bank account, offering instant spending notifications, budgeting tools, and easy international transfers.
Book train and coach tickets across the UK and Europe, get live train times, platform information, and journey updates.
